title: goodenia sepalosa var. glandulosa
intro: Goodenia sepalosa var. glandulosa, also known as Glandular Goodenia, is a species of flowering plant native to Australia. It is a shrub that has been traditionally used by indigenous Australians for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant contains compounds that have been shown to exhibit antioxidant and anti-inflammatory activities, which may contribute to its potential health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving wound healing. In herbal preparations, Goodenia sepalosa var. glandulosa is typically used in teas, infusions, or tinctures, although more research is needed to fully understand its efficacy and safety as a medicinal plant.
